protein_name: Component of the PRP19-CDC5L complex that forms an integral part of the spliceosome and is required for activating pre-mRNA splicing. Participates in AID/AICDA-mediated Ig class switching recombination (CSR). May induce apoptosis. Widely expressed with highest levels in skeletal muscle, placenta, heart, spleen, testis and thyroid. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
